prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: Ollie the octopus lived in a cozy cave at the bottom of the shimmering sea. He had eight wiggly arms, big, round eyes, and skin that could change colors like a rainbow. But even with all those amazing octopus features, Ollie was very, very shy. He longed to play hide-and-seek in the coral reefs with the other sea creatures, but the thought of saying hello made his tentacles tremble and his skin turn a nervous shade of pale green.
